title: Jeff King
compiled_truth: Jeff King is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-04-18 to 2002-09-23), Jeff King sent 29 and received 606 emails, totalling 635 interactions. Top correspondents: [Doug Gilbert-Smith](people/doug-gilbert-smith) (4), [Dbartley](people/dbartley-o2wireless) (4), [Don Baughman](people/don-baughman) (2), [Paul Schiavone](people/paul-schiavone) (2), [Joe Quenet](people/joe-quenet) (2). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, calendar, deleted_items, inbox, sent, sent_items.
